title: SpiritVale Official Date release!
added: Demo launches June 12–22 on Steam — no content limits, everyone starts from Level 1
Steam Next Fest participation begins June 15 with demo already live
Early Access launches July 15 (~$15 USD one-time payment, regional pricing) — fresh start for all players
changed: Playtest ended June 8 — all game progress wiped; premium currency purchases will be refunded at Early Access
Kickstarter campaign ends July 2 — backers will be contacted to arrange rewards
Demo-to-EA transition: Demo progress wiped before July 15 Early Access launch
fixed: Performance and polish sprint June 8–12 to ensure smooth experience for Steam Next Fest Demo and Early Access
removed: Playtest access ended June 8 — servers offline between June 22 and July 15 (except stress testing by Phil)
